steps.title: Set up
steps.content:
Each tablet costs $170 with 7% tax: $170 \times 1.07 = \$181.90$ per tablet. The total for $n$ tablets must not exceed $3,400:
$$181.90n \leq 3400$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
$$n \leq \frac{3400}{181.90} \approx 18.69$$
Round down to the nearest whole number: $n = 18$.
